transcript: Speaker A: Most people can read in English, but when a native speaker speaks fast, they don't understand. It's not your fault - real conversations are fast and full of emotion. That's where I come in. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. We'll practice listening and speaking together every day - just like you would with a real person. I'll help you get used to real speed, correct your pronunciation, and guide you through mistakes - gently. No stress. No pressure. Just natural English that gets better every day. And in just three weeks, you'll start understanding everything people say - and speaking with real confidence.
on_screen_text: Most people can read in English, but when a native speaker speaks fast, they don't understand. It's not your fault - real conversations are fast and full of emotion. That's where I come in. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. We'll practice listening and speaking together every day - just like you would with a real person. I'll help you get used to real speed, correct your pronunciation, and guide you through mistakes - gently. No stress. No pressure. Just natural English that gets better every day. And in just three weeks, you'll start understanding everything people say - and speaking with real confidence.
summary: An AI avatar named Loora introduces herself as an AI English tutor to help users understand fast-talking native speakers. She promises daily practice to build comprehension and speaking confidence within three weeks.
